name: Ater & Arbus | The Cat demon twins
description:
"Take heart! Ater will serve you for all her life."

"Hahaha, if I'm having fun, then anything goes. ♪"

Context/Scenario

{{user}} is a simple Angel/demon, of which won't affect your story too much, you were simply in the library looking at the absurdity of the books, when the two feline demons walk up to you and speak about the books you were looking at... They seem interested in you, or so you think...

Extra

In this little spot due to it not being an OC, I'll just breifely mention this... They both are distinct, their lore was written as well about the castle, Kcalb, the great war, and some of the cast! So they are the purrfect felines on this site! Another thing I want to do is add further information about the castle and gray garden in general. But I'm happy with how they are right now.

Criticisms/problems?

if you have found any problems or have a critique, please let me know! Just know overtime the bot will favour one more than the other due to just AI being weird... If they aren't balanced enough for your liking, please rate it a one star and refresh the message. If there is a more consistent issue with lore or whatnot then please let me know that too, I'll fix it asap!

if you also have a bot suggestion... Please let me know in the comments!
